form.formComment: Recent efforts haven't been up to her best. Last start 5th (Sr3) over 1635m at Temora was 8th-12.1 at the bell, beaten 11 m by Mastablasta (2:02.00) in NR up to 33 on April 6 at $5.50. The run prior 7th (Fr3) over 1760m after showing early speed at Junee, at the bell was 2nd-1.6 beaten 15 m by Jungle Shark (2:13.40) in NR 34 to 38 on March 31 at $2.50. Better than the last run so worth another chance.

form.formComment: Not far away at the last couple starts; Finished 3.5 m third behind Mastablasta at Temora over 1635m NR up to 33 last start. Before that was beaten a neck third at Junee over 1760m same class on March 31. With even luck she could break through.
